hero.title: GEOPOLYMER: THE SCIENCE OF INDESTRUCTIBLE FLOORS.
hero.description: We do not simply pour concrete. We create artificial stone through advanced inorganic polymerisation.

intro.title: WHY GEOPOLYMER?
intro.body: GEONYX uses advanced inorganic polymer chemistry. Unlike Portland cement, which relies on hydration, our bonds are formed through polycondensation of aluminosilicates. The result is a floor with exceptional chemical resistance, faster curing and a significantly lower carbon footprint.

crossSection.title: SYSTEM X-RAY
crossSection.layer4desc: UV-stable, chemically resistant sealing layer. Anti-slip class R13.
crossSection.layer3desc: Primary load-bearing matrix. Modified quartz and inorganic polymer. Strength > 90 MPa.
crossSection.layer2desc: Deep-penetrating primer. Creates a molecular bond (Chemical Weld) with the substrate.
crossSection.layer1desc: Reinforced concrete substrate (minimum C20/25). Shot-blasted and cleaned.

chemistry.title: POLYCONDENSATION INSTEAD OF HYDRATION
chemistry.body: Concrete is like a sponge – full of capillaries from evaporated water. GEONYX is different.
chemistry.card1body: The chemical reaction expels water, creating a dense, non-porous 3D lattice.
chemistry.card2body: We do not use petroleum products (like epoxies). GEONYX is 100% mineral 'artificial stone'.

speed.title: TIME IS MONEY.
speed.body: Industry cannot wait 28 days for concrete to cure. Our technology enables extremely fast commissioning.

resistance.title: IMMUNITY TO AGGRESSION AND FIRE
resistance.body: Standard floors surrender to acids and fires. GEONYX is built to survive.
resistance.item1body: Unlike epoxies, which burn and emit smoke, GEONYX is mineral and non-combustible up to 1000°C.
resistance.item2body: Full resistance to concentrated acids, salts, sulphates and machine oils.

eco.body: We use industrial by-products and do not require energy-intensive kiln firing like cement. Choosing GEONYX means choosing the future.

cta.title: SCIENCE IS ON YOUR SIDE.
cta.body: Contact our engineering team for technical consultation.
